name: Cajun Oytser & Scallop Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan at approximately 300 degrees F. Add the vegetables and sauté until slightly browned. Remove from the heat.
2. In a separate pan, heat the half-and-half, being careful not to boil it. Reduce the temperature to approximately 150 degrees F. and slowly stir in the flour. When blended well, add the seasonings and spices.
3. Add the browned vegetables and drained oysters and scallops. Simmer for 15 minutes, stirring frequently.
4. Add the sherry and continue to simmer until the stew thickens. Add the croutons and serve!
